title: AxSellwands
description: A feature rich sell wand plugin with a simple configuration.
body:
![https://i.imgur.com/eC0Uzjr.png](https://i.imgur.com/eC0Uzjr.png)
[![https://i.imgur.com/r8htsU3.png](https://i.imgur.com/r8htsU3.png)](https://dc.artillex-studios.com/)[![https://i.imgur.com/zvCX3mt.png](https://i.imgur.com/zvCX3mt.png)](https://docs.artillex-studios.com/axsellwands.html)
![https://i.imgur.com/GviRoVK.png](https://i.imgur.com/GviRoVK.png)
<details>
<summary>Text Transcript</summary>


AXSELLWANDS
The Ultimate FREE SellWand plugin

WHAT IS AXSELLWANDS?
A feature rich sell wand plugin with a simple configuration.

FEATURES

Simple Configuration:
Its easy to set up

Optimized:
The plugin is very fast, doesn't affect tps

Easy to use
The plugin is easy to use and fully customizable

ONE-CLICK INSPECT
Ability to inspect the price of containers by left clicking on them

ENDERCHEST SUPPORT
This plugin includes the ability to sell items from ender chests

UNLIMITED SELLWANDS
It is possible to add an unlimited number of sell wands

SELL MULTIPLIERS
You can set sell multipliers to your sellwands!

SELL HOLOGRAMS
(no extra plugins required)

MERGING!
You can even merge your sellwands if you want because the plugin includes sellwand merging option

UNBREAKABLE SELL WANDS

SELLWAND COOLDOWNS

BUILTIN PRICE SYSTEM (Optional)

SELL PARTICLES, SOUNDS

WHITE & BLACKLISTS
Allow or disallow certain container types from being sold

NUMBER FORMATTING
Customizable and toggleable number formatting

</details>

![https://i.imgur.com/KVSdg95.png](https://i.imgur.com/KVSdg95.png)

* Permission: axsellwands.admin

- /axsellwands reload - Reload plugin
- /axsellwands give - List commands

![https://i.imgur.com/Ngm16we.png](https://i.imgur.com/Ngm16we.png)
### **Protection:**

* BentoBox
* GriefPrevention
* IridiumSkyBlock
* KingdomsX
* SuperiorSkyblock2
* Lands
* WorldGuard

### **Economy:**

* Vault
* PlayerPoints
* CoinsEngine
* RoyaleEconomy

### **Price provider: (you can use these instead of the builtin one)**

* AxGens
* ShopGuiPlus
* Essentials
* EconomyShopGUI
* CMI

**Is there a plugin that isn't supported? Open a ticket on our discord: [dc.artillex-studios.com](https://dc.artillex-studios.com/)**

**If you need Commissions, Support, or anything else**
